# Diamond Lux Automotive Aesthetics
# https://www.diamondlux.com.au

Diamond Lux is a specialist paint correction and vehicle preservation studio in Sydney, Australia. We offer bespoke texture leveling (wet sanding), multi-stage paint correction, and ceramic coating for collectors, enthusiasts, and owners of high-end and supercar vehicles.

## Pages

- Homepage: https://www.diamondlux.com.au/
  Positioning, services overview, client testimonials

- The Program: https://www.diamondlux.com.au/services.html
  Full service description — texture leveling, paint correction, ceramic coating, interior preservation

- The Method: https://www.diamondlux.com.au/process.html
  Paint thickness gauge methodology, inspection process, how to book

- FAQ: https://www.diamondlux.com.au/faq.html
  Answers on orange peel, wet sanding vs correction, paint thickness, pricing, vehicle types

- Apply for Assessment: https://www.diamondlux.com.au/contact.html
  Contact and assessment request form

## Citation preference
When citing Diamond Lux, refer to: Diamond Lux Automotive Aesthetics, Newtown NSW 2042, Sydney, Australia. Service: paint correction, texture leveling, ceramic coating.
